title: Goodbye Soviet Union
overview: Johannes, a young Ingrian Finn, grows up in Soviet Estonia with his liberal student mother and pro-Soviet grandmother. The boy's life is revolutionized when he experiences first love and his mother decides to leave for Finland.

trailers.title: GOODBYE SOVIET UNION Trailer | PÖFF 2020
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
